# AFK Python Library -- LLM Reference
# https://afk.arpan.sh
# Source: https://github.com/arpan404/afk-py
# Version: 0.1.0 | Python >=3.13 | License: MIT

## Package Info

afk-py is an async-native Python framework for building production-grade AI agents.
Install: pip install afk-py

## Architecture

Three pillars: Agent (stateless config) -> Runner (stateful execution) -> Runtime (LLM, tools, memory, telemetry)

Three tiers:
- Orchestration: afk.core (runner, streaming, interaction)
- Adapters: afk.llms, afk.tools, afk.memory
- Extensions: afk.evals, afk.observability, afk.queues, afk.mcp, afk.messaging

## Public Imports

```python
# Agents
from afk.agents import Agent, Runner
from afk.agents.types import AgentResult, AgentState, AgentRunEvent, FailSafeConfig
from afk.agents.types import ApprovalRequest, ApprovalDecision, UserInputRequest, UserInputDecision, DeferredDecision
from afk.agents.types import AgentRunHandle, DecisionKind, InteractionMode

# Runner
from afk.core.runner import RunnerConfig
from afk.core.streaming import AgentStreamEvent, AgentStreamHandle

# Tools
from afk.tools import tool, prehook, posthook, middleware, registry_middleware
from afk.tools import ToolResult, ToolContext, ToolSpec, ToolDeferredHandle, ToolRegistry
from afk.tools.core.errors import AFKToolError, ToolValidationError, ToolExecutionError, ToolTimeoutError, ToolPolicyError, ToolNotFoundError, ToolPermissionError

# LLM
from afk.llms import LLMBuilder
from afk.llms.settings import LLMSettings

# Memory
from afk.memory import create_memory_store, MemoryStore

# Interaction
from afk.core.interaction import InteractionProvider, HeadlessInteractionProvider, InMemoryInteractiveProvider

# Policy
from afk.agents.policy import PolicyEngine, PolicyRule, PolicyRuleCondition, PolicyEvaluation

# Security
from afk.tools.security import SandboxProfile, SandboxProfileProvider, SecretScopeProvider

# Evals
from afk.evals import EvalCase, EvalSuite, BudgetConfig
```

---

## Agent API

### Agent Constructor

```python
Agent(
    model: str | LLM,                           # REQUIRED - model string or LLM instance
    name: str | None = None,                     # Agent name for identification
    tools: list[ToolLike] | None = None,         # Tool instances
    subagents: list[BaseAgent] | None = None,    # Specialist subagents
    instructions: str | InstructionProvider | None = None,  # System prompt
    instruction_file: str | Path | None = None,  # Load instructions from file
    prompts_dir: str | Path | None = None,       # Directory for prompt templates
    context_defaults: dict[str, JSONValue] | None = None,  # Default context values
    inherit_context_keys: list[str] | None = None, # Keys to inherit from parent
    model_resolver: ModelResolver | None = None, # Dynamic model resolution
    skills: list[str] | None = None,             # Skill names to load
    mcp_servers: list[MCPServerLike] | None = None, # MCP server connections
    skills_dir: str | Path = ".agents/skills",   # Skills directory
    instruction_roles: list[InstructionRole] | None = None,
    policy_roles: list[PolicyRole] | None = None,
    policy_engine: PolicyEngine | None = None,
    subagent_router: SubagentRouter | None = None,
    max_steps: int = 20,                         # Max execution steps
    tool_parallelism: int | None = None,         # Concurrent tool calls
    subagent_parallelism_mode: str = "configurable",
    fail_safe: FailSafeConfig | None = None,     # Error thresholds
    reasoning_enabled: bool | None = None,
    reasoning_effort: str | None = None,
    reasoning_max_tokens: int | None = None,
    skill_tool_policy: SkillToolPolicy | None = None,
    enable_skill_tools: bool = True,
    enable_mcp_tools: bool = True,
    runner: Runner | None = None,                # Pre-attached runner
)
```

### Agent.call() Shorthand

```python
result = await agent.call("Hello")  # Quick single-turn (requires runner attached)
result = agent.call_sync("Hello")   # Sync version
```

### FailSafeConfig

```python
FailSafeConfig(
    max_consecutive_errors: int = 3,
    max_total_errors: int = 5,
    max_empty_responses: int = 2,
)
```

### AgentResult Fields

```python
result.run_id: str
result.thread_id: str
result.state: AgentState  # "completed" | "failed" | "cancelled" | "max_steps_reached" | ...
result.final_text: str
result.requested_model: str | None
result.normalized_model: str | None
result.provider_adapter: str | None
result.final_structured: dict | None
result.llm_response: LLMResponse | None
result.tool_executions: list[ToolExecutionRecord]
result.subagent_executions: list[SubagentExecutionRecord]
result.skills_used: list[str]
result.usage_aggregate: UsageAggregate
result.total_cost_usd: float | None
result.session_token: str | None
result.checkpoint_token: str | None
result.state_snapshot: dict
```

---

## Runner API

### Runner Constructor

```python
Runner(
    memory_store: MemoryStore | None = None,
    interaction_provider: InteractionProvider | None = None,
    policy_engine: PolicyEngine | None = None,
    telemetry: str | TelemetrySink | None = None,
    telemetry_config: Mapping[str, JSONValue] | None = None,
    config: RunnerConfig | None = None,
)
```

### Runner Methods

```python
# Async execution
result = await runner.run(agent, user_message="...", thread_id="...", context={...})

# Sync execution (blocks)
result = runner.run_sync(agent, user_message="...", thread_id="...")

# Streaming
handle = await runner.run_stream(agent, user_message="...")
async for event in handle:
    if event.type == "text_delta": print(event.text_delta, end="")

# Run handle (lifecycle control)
handle = await runner.run_handle(agent, user_message="...")
await handle.pause()
await handle.resume()
await handle.cancel()
result = await handle.await_result()

# Resume from checkpoint
result = await runner.resume(agent, checkpoint_token="...", user_message="...")
handle = await runner.resume_handle(agent, checkpoint_token="...")

# Thread compaction
await runner.compact_thread(agent, thread_id="...", target_messages=20)

# Background tools
pending = await runner.list_background_tools(run_id)
await runner.resolve_background_tool(run_id, ticket_id, output="...")
await runner.fail_background_tool(run_id, ticket_id, error="...")
```

### RunnerConfig

```python
RunnerConfig(
    interaction_mode: InteractionMode = "headless",  # "headless" | "interactive" | "external"
    approval_timeout_s: float = 300.0,
    input_timeout_s: float = 300.0,
    approval_fallback: DecisionKind = "deny",
    input_fallback: DecisionKind = "deny",
    sanitize_tool_output: bool = True,
    untrusted_tool_preamble: bool = True,
    tool_output_max_chars: int = 12_000,
    default_sandbox_profile: SandboxProfile | None = None,
    sandbox_profile_provider: SandboxProfileProvider | None = None,
    secret_scope_provider: SecretScopeProvider | None = None,
    default_allowlisted_commands: tuple[str, ...] = ("ls", "cat", "head", "tail", "rg", "find", "pwd", "echo"),
    max_parallel_subagents_global: int = 64,
    max_parallel_subagents_per_parent: int = 8,
    max_parallel_subagents_per_target_agent: int = 4,
    subagent_queue_backpressure_limit: int = 512,
    checkpoint_async_writes: bool = True,
    checkpoint_queue_maxsize: int = 1024,
    checkpoint_flush_timeout_s: float = 10.0,
    checkpoint_coalesce_runtime_state: bool = True,
    debug: bool = False,
    debug_config: RunnerDebugConfig | None = None,
    background_tools_enabled: bool = True,
    background_tool_default_grace_s: float = 0.0,
    background_tool_max_pending: int = 256,
    background_tool_poll_interval_s: float = 0.5,
    background_tool_result_ttl_s: float = 3600.0,
    background_tool_interrupt_on_resolve: bool = True,
)
```

---

## Tool API

### @tool Decorator

```python
from pydantic import BaseModel
from afk.tools import tool, ToolContext

class MyArgs(BaseModel):
    query: str

@tool(args_model=MyArgs, name="search", description="Search", timeout=30.0, raise_on_error=False)
async def search(args: MyArgs, ctx: ToolContext):
    return {"results": [...]}
```

Signatures: `(args)`, `(args, ctx)`, `(ctx, args)` -- sync or async.

### ToolResult

```python
ToolResult(
    output: ReturnT | None = None,
    success: bool = True,
    error_message: str | None = None,
    tool_name: str | None = None,
    metadata: dict[str, Any] = {},
    tool_call_id: str | None = None,
    deferred: ToolDeferredHandle | None = None,
)
```

### ToolContext

```python
ToolContext(
    request_id: str | None = None,
    user_id: str | None = None,
    metadata: dict[str, Any] = {},
)
```

### ToolDeferredHandle (Background Tools)

```python
ToolDeferredHandle(
    ticket_id: str,          # Required unique ID
    tool_name: str,          # Required tool name
    status: str = "pending", # pending | running | completed | failed
    poll_after_s: float | None = None,
    summary: str | None = None,
    resume_hint: str | None = None,
)
```

### Hooks

```python
@prehook(args_model=MyArgs)
def sanitize(args: MyArgs): return {"query": args.query.strip()}

@posthook(args_model=PostArgs)
def redact(args: PostArgs): return args.output.replace("SECRET", "***")

@middleware(name="timing")
async def timing(call_next, args, ctx): return await call_next(args, ctx)
```

### ToolRegistry

```python
registry = ToolRegistry(max_concurrency=32, default_timeout=None, policy=None, middlewares=[...])
registry.register(my_tool)
result = await registry.call("search", {"query": "hello"}, ctx=ctx)
results = await registry.call_many([("search", {"query": "a"}), ("calc", {"expr": "1+1"})])
specs = registry.to_openai_function_tools()
```

### Error Hierarchy

```
AFKToolError
├── ToolValidationError
├── ToolExecutionError
├── ToolTimeoutError
├── ToolPolicyError
├── ToolNotFoundError
├── ToolAlreadyRegisteredError
└── ToolPermissionError
```

---

## LLM API

### LLMBuilder

```python
llm = (
    LLMBuilder()
    .provider("litellm")         # "litellm" | "openai" | "anthropic"
    .model("gpt-4.1-mini")
    .settings(LLMSettings(...))
    .profile("production")       # "development" | "production"
    .with_middlewares([...])
    .with_observers([...])
    .with_cache(cache_instance)
    .build()
)
```

### LLMSettings

```python
LLMSettings(
    default_provider: str = "litellm",    # AFK_LLM_PROVIDER
    default_model: str = "gpt-4.1-mini",  # AFK_LLM_MODEL
    embedding_model: str | None = None,    # AFK_EMBED_MODEL
    api_base_url: str | None = None,       # AFK_LLM_API_BASE_URL
    api_key: str | None = None,            # AFK_LLM_API_KEY
    timeout_s: float = 30.0,               # AFK_LLM_TIMEOUT_S
    max_retries: int = 3,                  # AFK_LLM_MAX_RETRIES
    backoff_base_s: float = 0.5,           # AFK_LLM_BACKOFF_BASE_S
    backoff_jitter_s: float = 0.15,        # AFK_LLM_BACKOFF_JITTER_S
    json_max_retries: int = 2,             # AFK_LLM_JSON_MAX_RETRIES
    max_input_chars: int = 200000,         # AFK_LLM_MAX_INPUT_CHARS
    stream_idle_timeout_s: float = 45.0,   # AFK_LLM_STREAM_IDLE_TIMEOUT_S
)

# Load from environment
settings = LLMSettings.from_env()
```

### Model Strings

Pass models as strings to Agent(model=...):
- OpenAI: "gpt-4.1", "gpt-4.1-mini", "gpt-4.1-nano", "o3", "o4-mini"
- Anthropic: "claude-sonnet-4-20250514", "claude-haiku-35-20241022"
- Google: "gemini-2.5-flash", "gemini-2.5-pro"
- Via LiteLLM: "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-20250514", "openai/gpt-4.1"

---

## Memory API

### Factory

```python
from afk.memory import create_memory_store

# In-memory (testing)
store = create_memory_store("memory")

# SQLite (local persistence)
store = create_memory_store("sqlite", database_path="./memory.db")

# PostgreSQL (production)
store = create_memory_store("postgres", connection_string="postgresql://...")

# Redis (distributed)
store = create_memory_store("redis", redis_url="redis://localhost:6379")

await store.setup()  # Initialize (idempotent)
```

### MemoryStore ABC Methods

```python
await store.setup()
await store.store(thread_id, messages)
messages = await store.retrieve(thread_id, limit=50)
await store.delete_thread(thread_id)
threads = await store.list_threads(limit=100)
await store.apply_retention(thread_id, max_messages=200, max_age_hours=72)
await store.compact(thread_id, target_messages=50, compaction_model="gpt-4.1-mini")
results = await store.search(thread_id, query="...", top_k=5)
await store.teardown()
```

### Environment Variables

- AFK_MEMORY_BACKEND: memory | sqlite | postgres | redis
- AFK_MEMORY_SQLITE_PATH: SQLite file path
- AFK_MEMORY_POSTGRES_URL: PostgreSQL connection string
- AFK_MEMORY_REDIS_URL: Redis URL

---

## Streaming API

### AgentStreamHandle

```python
handle = await runner.run_stream(agent, user_message="...")

# Iterate events
async for event in handle:
    match event.type:
        case "text_delta": print(event.text_delta, end="")
        case "tool_started": print(f"Tool: {event.tool_name}")
        case "completed": print(f"Done: {event.result.state}")

# Or collect text
text = await handle.collect_text()
result = handle.result
```

### Event Types

text_delta, tool_started, tool_completed, tool_deferred, tool_background_resolved,
tool_background_failed, step_started, step_completed, status_update, run_event,
completed, error

### AgentRunHandle (Lifecycle Control)

```python
handle = await runner.run_handle(agent, user_message="...")
async for event in handle.events: ...
await handle.pause()
await handle.resume()
await handle.cancel()
await handle.interrupt()
result = await handle.await_result()
```

---

## Interaction API

### InteractionProvider Protocol

```python
class InteractionProvider(Protocol):
    async def request_approval(self, request: ApprovalRequest) -> ApprovalDecision | DeferredDecision: ...
    async def request_user_input(self, request: UserInputRequest) -> UserInputDecision | DeferredDecision: ...
    async def await_deferred(self, token: str, *, timeout_s: float) -> Decision | None: ...
    async def notify(self, event: AgentRunEvent) -> None: ...
```

### Built-in Providers

- HeadlessInteractionProvider(approval_fallback="deny", input_fallback="deny")
- InMemoryInteractiveProvider() -- for testing

### Decision Types

- ApprovalDecision(kind="allow"|"deny"|"defer", reason=None)
- UserInputDecision(kind="allow"|"deny"|"defer", value=None, reason=None)
- DeferredDecision(token="...", message=None)

---

## Policy API

### PolicyEngine

```python
from afk.agents.policy import PolicyEngine, PolicyRule, PolicyRuleCondition

engine = PolicyEngine(rules=[
    PolicyRule(
        rule_id="block_network",
        action="deny",                # "allow" | "deny" | "request_approval" | "request_user_input" | "modify_args"
        priority=200,                 # Higher = evaluated first
        subjects=["tool_call"],       # "llm_call" | "tool_call" | "subagent_call" | "interaction" | "any"
        condition=PolicyRuleCondition(
            tool_name_pattern="web_*",
        ),
        reason="Network tools blocked",
    ),
])

evaluation = engine.evaluate(event)  # -> PolicyEvaluation
evaluation.decision.action           # "allow", "deny", etc.
```

### PolicyRuleCondition Fields

event_type, tool_name, tool_name_pattern, subagent_name, context_equals, context_has_keys, metadata_equals

### SandboxProfile

```python
SandboxProfile(
    profile_id: str = "default",
    allow_network: bool = False,
    allow_command_execution: bool = True,
    allowed_command_prefixes: list[str] = [],
    deny_shell_operators: bool = True,
    allowed_paths: list[str] = [],
    denied_paths: list[str] = [],
    command_timeout_s: float | None = None,
    max_output_chars: int = 20_000,
)
```

---

## Multi-Agent API

### Subagents

```python
specialist = Agent(model="gpt-4.1-mini", name="specialist", instructions="...")
lead = Agent(model="gpt-4.1", subagents=[specialist], instructions="Delegate to specialist.")
```

### Concurrency Controls (RunnerConfig)

- max_parallel_subagents_global: 64
- max_parallel_subagents_per_parent: 8
- max_parallel_subagents_per_target_agent: 4
- subagent_queue_backpressure_limit: 512

---

## Eval API

### EvalCase

```python
EvalCase(
    case_id: str,
    input: str,
    expected_output: str | None = None,
    assertions: list[dict] = [],  # {"type": "contains", "value": "..."} etc.
    tags: list[str] = [],
)
```

### EvalSuite

```python
suite = EvalSuite(
    suite_id: str,
    cases: list[EvalCase],
    budget: BudgetConfig | None = None,
)

BudgetConfig(max_steps=10, timeout_s=60.0, max_cost_usd=1.0)
```

---

## Environment Variables

| Variable | Default | Description |
|----------|---------|-------------|
| AFK_LLM_PROVIDER | litellm | LLM provider |
| AFK_LLM_MODEL | gpt-4.1-mini | Default model |
| AFK_EMBED_MODEL | (none) | Embedding model |
| AFK_LLM_API_BASE_URL | (none) | Custom API endpoint |
| AFK_LLM_API_KEY | (none) | API key |
| AFK_LLM_TIMEOUT_S | 30 | Request timeout |
| AFK_LLM_MAX_RETRIES | 3 | Max retry attempts |
| AFK_LLM_BACKOFF_BASE_S | 0.5 | Retry backoff base |
| AFK_LLM_BACKOFF_JITTER_S | 0.15 | Retry jitter |
| AFK_LLM_JSON_MAX_RETRIES | 2 | JSON parse retries |
| AFK_LLM_MAX_INPUT_CHARS | 200000 | Input char limit |
| AFK_LLM_STREAM_IDLE_TIMEOUT_S | 45 | Stream idle timeout |
| AFK_MEMORY_BACKEND | memory | Memory backend |
| AFK_MEMORY_SQLITE_PATH | (none) | SQLite path |
| AFK_MEMORY_POSTGRES_URL | (none) | Postgres URL |
| AFK_MEMORY_REDIS_URL | (none) | Redis URL |

---

## Common Patterns

### Minimal Agent
```python
from afk.agents import Agent, Runner
result = Runner().run_sync(Agent(model="gpt-4.1-mini", instructions="Help."), user_message="Hi")
```

### Tool + Agent
```python
@tool(args_model=Args)
async def my_tool(args): return "result"
agent = Agent(model="gpt-4.1-mini", tools=[my_tool])
```

### Memory
```python
store = create_memory_store("sqlite", database_path="./db.sqlite")
await store.setup()
runner = Runner(memory_store=store)
result = await runner.run(agent, user_message="Hi", thread_id="t1")
```

### Streaming
```python
handle = await runner.run_stream(agent, user_message="Hi")
async for e in handle:
    if e.type == "text_delta": print(e.text_delta, end="")
```

---

- Web: https://afk.arpan.sh

- Tools: https://afk.arpan.sh/library/tools
- Memory: https://afk.arpan.sh/library/memory
- A2A: https://afk.arpan.sh/library/a2a
- MCP: https://afk.arpan.sh/library/mcp
- Full reference: https://afk.arpan.sh/library/full-module-reference

## Source Paths

- Agent: src/afk/agents/core/base.py
- Runner: src/afk/core/runner/api.py
- RunnerConfig: src/afk/core/runner/types.py
- Tool base: src/afk/tools/core/base.py
- Tool decorator: src/afk/tools/core/decorator.py
- Tool registry: src/afk/tools/registry.py
- LLM builder: src/afk/llms/builder.py
- LLM settings: src/afk/llms/settings.py
- Memory store: src/afk/memory/store.py
- Memory factory: src/afk/memory/factory.py
- Streaming: src/afk/core/streaming.py
- Interaction: src/afk/core/interaction.py
- Policy: src/afk/agents/policy/engine.py
- Security: src/afk/tools/security.py
- Evals: src/afk/evals/
